<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Tasks\Monitor\HealthChecks; use Spatie\Backup\BackupDestination\BackupDestination; use Spatie\Backup\Tasks\Monitor\HealthCheck; class IsReachable extends HealthCheck { public function checkHealth(BackupDestination $backupDestination): void { $this->failUnless( $backupDestination->isReachable(), trans('backup::notifications.unhealthy_backup_found_not_reachable', [ 'error' => $backupDestination->connectionError, ]) ); } }
